_note: Well-known spreads offered in the Caster dropdown. Each position has x/y as fractions of the board (0–1) so the layout is recognisable (the Celtic Cross looks like a cross). Meanings lean toward 'the shape a situation is in' rather than hard fortune — the house style — while keeping the classic names. Author PlayfulProcess; CC-BY-SA-4.0. Add your own via the Spread Builder and contribute the JSON.

spreads.name: Structures · Process · Possibilities
spreads.description: The house spread — read the shape of a situation, not a fortune.

positions.label: Structures
positions.meaning: What's already built — the patterns and conditions holding this in place.

positions.label: Process
positions.meaning: What's moving — the change underway right now.

positions.label: Possibilities
positions.meaning: What could emerge — the openings not yet committed.

spreads.name: Single Card
spreads.description: One card. A mirror for the day, or one clear question.

positions.label: The Card
positions.meaning: What is already alive in you, asking to be looked at.

spreads.name: Past · Present · Future
spreads.description: The classic three — read as a current, not a prophecy.

positions.label: Past
positions.meaning: What this grew from — the ground just behind you.

positions.label: Present
positions.meaning: Where you stand now — the heart of it.

positions.label: Future
positions.meaning: Where the shape is tending if nothing turns.

spreads.name: The Five-Card Cross
spreads.description: A situation and its four pressures — heart, above, below, and either side.

positions.label: The Heart
positions.meaning: The centre of the matter, where you stand.

positions.label: Above
positions.meaning: What you aspire to, or what oversees this.

positions.label: Below
positions.meaning: The root it grows from, often unspoken.

positions.label: Behind
positions.meaning: What is passing, just leaving the frame.

positions.label: Before
positions.meaning: What is approaching, just entering it.

spreads.name: The Celtic Cross
spreads.description: The famous ten — a cross of the situation and a staff of the self. Classic names; read for shape and tendency, not certainty.

positions.label: 1 · Present
positions.meaning: The heart of it — where you stand now.

positions.label: 2 · Challenge
positions.meaning: What crosses you — the obstacle, or the help in disguise.

positions.label: 3 · Foundation
positions.meaning: The root it grows from — the deeper past.

positions.label: 4 · Recent past
positions.meaning: What is passing, just behind you.

positions.label: 5 · Crown
positions.meaning: What you aim at, or what oversees the situation.

positions.label: 6 · Near future
positions.meaning: What approaches next.

positions.label: 7 · You
positions.meaning: Yourself in it — your stance and posture.

positions.label: 8 · Environment
positions.meaning: Others and the setting around you.

positions.label: 9 · Hopes & fears
positions.meaning: What you long for and what you dread (often the same).

positions.label: 10 · Outcome
positions.meaning: Where this shape is tending, all things held.
